perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman sitting in an office environment, focused on her laptop. She appears stressed and excited, holding fan merchandise like a lightstick and a plushie. (2) She celebrates with high energy, raising her arms as she successfully performs a task on her laptop. (3) Transition to an outdoor street scene where the woman walks and expresses discomfort due to the heat and humidity, touching her hair which looks flat and slightly frizzy. (4) The scene shifts to a retail store (Watsons) where she stands in front of a Pantene product display. (5) Close-up shots of her hair showing split ends and frizz, followed by a demonstration of her applying hair conditioner and shampoo. (6) She is seen in a studio or home setting, showing off her now smooth and shiny hair, walking confidently and spinning around. (7) The final shots show the product line on a table and her pointing towards the camera at the store.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Tense, fast-paced electronic keyboard music plays as the woman speaks rapidly and excitedly about buying concert tickets. Sound effects of rapid typing are heard. (2) An upbeat, cheerful pop track fades in as she cheers 'Got it!'. (3) A professional male voiceover narrator takes over, describing the benefits of the hair product over a rhythmic, high-energy background track. (4) Sound effects such as 'sparkles' and 'whooshes' emphasize the visual transition to healthy hair. (5) The woman's voice returns intermittently to express satisfaction. (6) The music remains consistent and energetic until the end, concluding with a clear promotional statement about a store discount.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '這次久違的有希澈' - Functional text expressing excitement about a celebrity. (2) '又是20週年' - Decorative text regarding an anniversary. (3) '搶到了!' - Hook text showing success in buying tickets. (4) '潘婷 3分鐘奇蹟系列' - Functional text identifying the product brand and series. (5) '細軟髮 & 自然捲' - Functional text describing hair types. (6) '很毛躁' - Descriptive text for frizzy hair with an emotional emoji. (7) '清爽又不黏膩' - Functional text highlighting product benefits (fresh and non-sticky). (8) '淡淡淡蒼蘭花香' - Descriptive text for the fragrance. (9) '屈臣氏有優惠' - Functional call-to-action regarding a discount at Watsons.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Fan life/Stress) -> Problem (Hair issues in heat) -> Solution (Pantene product intro and demo) -> Outro (Results and CTA)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appearing throughout the video; a few blurred passers-by in the background of the street scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, initially wearing a blue oversized sports jersey, later seen in a white off-the-shoulder knit top and light-blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An open-plan office with desks and laptops, a city street with traffic and storefronts, the interior of a Watsons pharmacy with shelves of beauty products, and a modern studio with yellow and white walls.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting and natural daylight.

vocal_qualities.tone: Excited and energetic (female), steady and professional (male narrator)

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Results -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle-integrated advertisement for Pantene's '3 Minute Miracle' hair care series. It starts with a relatable high-energy scenario (an idol fan trying to buy concert tickets) to capture attention, then transitions to a common struggle (hair getting flat and frizzy in humid weather) before presenting the product as a transformative solution that provides 'miraculous' results for difficult hair types.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product demonstration, verbal recommendation by the creator and a narrator, and mention of a specific retail promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy fan-girl persona, fast-paced editing with variety-show style captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the popularity of fan culture ('stanning' idols) to create a hook that resonates with a specific young demographic before pivoting into a beauty product review.
